'''竏喞h-dh-th''' ('''kachadhath''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:youthsplain|youthsplain]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-dh-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:youthsplain|youthsplain]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 竏喞h-dh-th
|-
! Lemma
| kachadhath
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thichadhath|thichadhath]] || [[word:jichadhath|jichadhath]] || [[word:shichadhath|shichadhath]] || [[word:kichadhath|kichadhath]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuchadhath|thuthuchadhath]] || [[word:jujuchadhath|jujuchadhath]] || [[word:shushuchadhath|shushuchadhath]] || [[word:kukuchadhath|kukuchadhath]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuchadhath|thuchadhath]] || [[word:juchadhath|juchadhath]] || [[word:shuchadhath|shuchadhath]] || [[word:kuchadhath|kuchadhath]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuchadhath|thuchadhath]] || [[word:juchadhath|juchadhath]] || [[word:shuchadhath|shuchadhath]] || [[word:kuchadhath|kuchadhath]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thechadhath|thechadhath]] || [[word:jechadhath|jechadhath]] || [[word:shechadhath|shechadhath]] || [[word:kechadhath|kechadhath]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothochadhath|thothochadhath]] || [[word:jojochadhath|jojochadhath]] || [[word:shoshochadhath|shoshochadhath]] || [[word:kokochadhath|kokochadhath]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thochadhath|thochadhath]] || [[word:jochadhath|jochadhath]] || [[word:shochadhath|shochadhath]] || [[word:kochadhath|kochadhath]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thochadhath|thochadhath]] || [[word:jochadhath|jochadhath]] || [[word:shochadhath|shochadhath]] || [[word:kochadhath|kochadhath]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:chadhath|chadhath]] || [[word:chadhath|chadhath]] || [[word:chadhath|chadhath]] || [[word:chadhath|chadhath]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:chadhath|chadhath]] || [[word:chadhath|chadhath]] || [[word:chadhath|chadhath]] || [[word:chadhath|chadhath]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:chadhath|chadhath]] || [[word:chadhath|chadhath]] || [[word:chadhath|chadhath]] || [[word:chadhath|chadhath]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:chadhath|chadhath]] || [[word:chadhath|chadhath]] || [[word:chadhath|chadhath]] || [[word:chadhath|chadhath]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thﾃｦchadhath|thﾃｦchadhath]] || [[word:jﾃｦchadhath|jﾃｦchadhath]] || [[word:shﾃｦchadhath|shﾃｦchadhath]] || [[word:kﾃｦchadhath|kﾃｦchadhath]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathachadhath|thathachadhath]] || [[word:jajachadhath|jajachadhath]] || [[word:shashachadhath|shashachadhath]] || [[word:kakachadhath|kakachadhath]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thachadhath|thachadhath]] || [[word:jachadhath|jachadhath]] || [[word:shachadhath|shachadhath]] || [[word:kachadhath|kachadhath]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thachadhath|thachadhath]] || [[word:jachadhath|jachadhath]] || [[word:shachadhath|shachadhath]] || [[word:kachadhath|kachadhath]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shachadhath|shachadhath]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshachadhath|goshachadhath]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishachadhath|gokishachadhath]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shachadhathnﾃｼ|shachadhathnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshachadhathnknﾃｼ|goshachadhathnknﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishachadhathnﾃｼ|gokishachadhathnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shachadhathshﾃｫ|shachadhathshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshachadhathnkshﾃｫ|goshachadhathnkshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishachadhathshﾃｫ|gokishachadhathshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shachadhathro|shachadhathro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshachadhathnkro|goshachadhathnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishachadhathro|gokishachadhathro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shachadhathmu|shachadhathmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshachadhathnkmu|goshachadhathnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishachadhathmu|gokishachadhathmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shachadhathsher|shachadhathsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshachadhathnksher|goshachadhathnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishachadhathsher|gokishachadhathsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shachadhathng|shachadhathng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshachadhathnkng|goshachadhathnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishachadhathng|gokishachadhathng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shachadhathya|shachadhathya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshachadhathnkya|goshachadhathnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishachadhathya|gokishachadhathya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shachadhathyam|shachadhathyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshachadhathnkyam|goshachadhathnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishachadhathyam|gokishachadhathyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shachadhathnﾃｼshﾃｫ|shachadhathnﾃｼshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshachadhathnknﾃｼshﾃｫ|goshachadhathnknﾃｼshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishachadhathnﾃｼshﾃｫ|gokishachadhathnﾃｼshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shachadhathnﾃｼro|shachadhathnﾃｼro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshachadhathnknﾃｼro|goshachadhathnknﾃｼro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishachadhathnﾃｼro|gokishachadhathnﾃｼro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shachadhathnﾃｼmu|shachadhathnﾃｼmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshachadhathnknﾃｼmu|goshachadhathnknﾃｼmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishachadhathnﾃｼmu|gokishachadhathnﾃｼmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shachadhathshﾃｫnﾃｼ|shachadhathshﾃｫnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshachadhathnkshﾃｫnﾃｼ|goshachadhathnkshﾃｫnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishachadhathshﾃｫnﾃｼ|gokishachadhathshﾃｫnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shachadhathshﾃｫro|shachadhathshﾃｫro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshachadhathnkshﾃｫro|goshachadhathnkshﾃｫro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishachadhathshﾃｫro|gokishachadhathshﾃｫro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shachadhathshﾃｫmu|shachadhathshﾃｫmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshachadhathnkshﾃｫmu|goshachadhathnkshﾃｫmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishachadhathshﾃｫmu|gokishachadhathshﾃｫmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shachadhathronﾃｼ|shachadhathronﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshachadhathnkronﾃｼ|goshachadhathnkronﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishachadhathronﾃｼ|gokishachadhathronﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shachadhathroshﾃｫ|shachadhathroshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshachadhathnkroshﾃｫ|goshachadhathnkroshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishachadhathroshﾃｫ|gokishachadhathroshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shachadhathromu|shachadhathromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshachadhathnkromu|goshachadhathnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishachadhathromu|gokishachadhathromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shachadhathmunﾃｼ|shachadhathmunﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshachadhathnkmunﾃｼ|goshachadhathnkmunﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishachadhathmunﾃｼ|gokishachadhathmunﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shachadhathmushﾃｫ|shachadhathmushﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshachadhathnkmushﾃｫ|goshachadhathnkmushﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishachadhathmushﾃｫ|gokishachadhathmushﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shachadhathmuro|shachadhathmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshachadhathnkmuro|goshachadhathnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishachadhathmuro|gokishachadhathmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki active verbs]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c6f8e69}}
